meaning: n.[化]质子化作用,加质子作用
examples: The antibacterial ability of chitosan to E. coli was related to the protonation of amino group.
Influence of ionic strength, pH, etc. on the solubility, charge, and protonation of amino acids.
It is very important to determine the protonation constants of tetraphenylporphyrin derivatives for studying their colorful performance.
